overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk along a wet residential sidewalk in Los Santos. The player passes parked vehicles and a street food cart under atmospheric foggy conditions with streetlight reflections on the wet pavement.

events.description: blue SUV comes into view on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past residential buildings

entered.detail: multi-story apartment building with lit windows
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
tall street lamp illuminating the foggy street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a quiet residential sidewalk at night. The wet pavement reflects the glow of streetlights cutting through the fog. Residential buildings with lit windows line the right side while palm trees stand against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parked vehicles and approaching vendor

events.description: passing blue SUV and red sedan parked along the curb
yellow food cart becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing past parked vehicles while approaching a street vendor

notable_agents.action: blue SUV stopped at the curb with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: blue sport utility vehicle stopped at the curb
red sedan parked ahead of the SUV
traffic sign reading DO NOT BLOCK INTERSECTION
food cart with yellow umbrella and Burger Shot logo

segments.scene_description: Walking past parked vehicles along the curb, including a blue SUV and red sedan. A yellow food cart with a Burger Shot logo becomes visible in the foggy distance ahead, while street signs and palm trees continue to line the path.

events.description: passing the Burger Shot food cart on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor cart and continuing down the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Passing the yellow Burger Shot food cart positioned on the sidewalk. The parked vehicles fall behind as the walk continues past the vendor, with the foggy residential street stretching ahead illuminated by streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a foggy residential sidewalk at night that transitions from a quiet street view to a close encounter with a roadside vendor. It begins by moving past residential buildings with lit windows, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of streetlights cutting through the haze. As the camera advances, the path opens up to reveal a line of parked vehicles, including a blue SUV and a red sedan, while a yellow Burger Shot food cart emerges from the foggy distance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes directly by the food cart, leaving the parked cars behind. Finally, the walk continues forward, stretching further into the illuminated, misty street lined with palm trees.
